title: Mushroom Garlic Udon
description: Chewy udon noodles tossed with glossy soy-butter mushrooms and scallions.
instructions: Cook the udon according to package instructions.
Saute the mushrooms with garlic until deeply browned.
Add soy sauce and butter to create a glossy sauce.
Toss with noodles and finish with scallions.

title: Spicy Tofu Lettuce Wraps
description: Crisp lettuce cups filled with spicy tofu, ginger, and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Crumble the tofu and season with soy sauce and chili sauce.
Cook with ginger and garlic until lightly crisp.
Spoon into lettuce cups and serve.

title: Herbed Salmon Couscous
description: Tender salmon over lemony couscous with parsley and olive oil.
instructions: Cook the couscous and fluff with lemon juice.
Pan-sear the salmon until just cooked through.
Fold parsley and olive oil into the couscous.
Serve with sliced cucumber and extra lemon.
